maintenanceNote: When releasing app changes, bump APP_VERSION in src/version.ts, APP_VERSION in sw.js and public/sw.js, plus this version value and the public version.json so Settings, service worker caches, and update checks stay in sync.
notes: Added Tracking-page access to copy the AI Quick Log prompt.
Updated the AI prompt to support product photos and nutrition labels.
Made the Track tab scroll back to the top.
